feedback.text: The ‘Stop Killing Games’ initiative, which supports as a video player and as an interested party in the right of the consumer to enjoy all parts of a product purchased (and not a mere licence!), aims to make it illegal or at least discourage predatory practices and to limit fraud with regard to the world of video software, which all too often sees projects following the process of eliminating a product and EULA that is too nebulous or permissive. The Digital Fairness Act should include clauses and arrangements for this area as it would make it more comprehensive and make the EU a bulwark of consumer rights.
